_comment_top: DockStream JSON template for the DiffPROTACs evaluator. Copy this file, edit the FIVE fields marked with TODO_FILL_IN, and pass it via --docking_config to evaluate.py. See https://github.com/MolecularAI/DockStream for the full schema.

parameters._TODO_FILL_IN_1_binary_location: Replace with absolute path to AutoDock Vina binary directory, e.g. /home/<you>/DockStream-master-master/DockStreamCommunity/autodock_vina_1_1_2_linux_x86/bin
parameters._TODO_FILL_IN_2_receptor: Replace with absolute path to your target receptor PDBQT file (the protein you want PROTAC ligands to bind).
parameters._TODO_FILL_IN_3_search_space: Set the docking box center & size in Angstroms. For PROTAC ligands the box should be large enough to enclose the entire ternary pocket (typical: 25-30 A on each side).

output._TODO_FILL_IN_4_poses: Output SDF for docked poses. The evaluator overwrites this per-call, but provide a sensible default.
output._TODO_FILL_IN_5_scores: Output CSV for scores. Same note as above.
